name: 48_Stock_Trading_Simulation_PPO_HistoricalData_RL
query: Habari! Ninavutiwa na kuendeleza wakala wa biashara ya hisa kwa kutumia algoriti ya Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO). Wazo ni kutumia data ya kihistoria ya soko kwa mafunzo na majaribio. Mazingira ya simulizi ya biashara ya hisa yanapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/env.py`. Algoriti ya Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) inapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/train.py`. Tafadhali hifadhi wakala aliyefunzwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Rekodi maamuzi yote ya biashara katika `results/trade_decisions.txt` na hifadhi faida jumla katika `results/metrics/total_profit.txt`. Onyesha mchakato wa faida na uhifadhi kama `results/figures/profit_curve.png`. Tengeneza ripoti inayojumuisha mkakati wa biashara, faida, na uchambuzi wa hatari, na uhifadhi kama `results/trading_strategy_report.md`. Tekeleza zana ya maingiliano kwa kutumia Streamlit katika `src/visualize.py` inayoruhusu watumiaji kujaribu vigezo tofauti na kuendesha simulizi.

requirements.criteria: Mazingira ya simulizi ya biashara ya hisa yanatekelezwa katika `src/env.py`.
Data ya kihistoria ya soko inatumika kwa mafunzo na majaribio.
Algoriti ya "Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)" inatekelezwa katika `src/train.py`.
Maamuzi ya biashara yanarekodiwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/trade_decisions.txt`.
Mchakato wa faida unaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/profit_curve.png`.
Ripoti inayojumuisha mkakati wa biashara, faida, na uchambuzi wa hatari inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/trading_strategy_report.md`.
Zana ya maingiliano inayoruhusu watumiaji kujaribu vigezo tofauti na kuendesha simulizi kwa kutumia "Streamlit" inatekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.

preferences.criteria: Uonyeshaji wa mchakato wa faida unapaswa kuonyesha biashara au matukio muhimu ambayo yaliathiri utendaji.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha maarifa juu ya jinsi urekebishaji wa vigezo unavyoathiri matokeo ya biashara.

judge_stats.criteria: Mazingira ya simulizi ya biashara ya hisa yanatekelezwa katika `src/env.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/env.py` file does not implement a stock trading simulation environment. Instead, it contains a `Gridworld` class (a simple grid-based environment unrelated to stock trading) and some placeholder metadata. There is no implementation of stock market state representation, price data handling, buy/sell/hold actions, portfolio management, or any trading-related logic. The file explicitly states it is a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a genuine stock trading environment.

judge_stats.criteria: Data ya kihistoria ya soko inatumika kwa mafunzo na majaribio.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file contains only a minimal/stub implementation that does not use any historical market data. The training loop (`train()` function) simply iterates over a range and accumulates a score without loading, processing, or utilizing any stock market dataset. There is no data loading code, no reference to historical price data, no dataset files in the project structure, and no actual PPO algorithm implementation that would consume such data. The implementation is explicitly labeled as "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and does not fulfill the requirement of using historical market data for training and testing.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya "Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)" inatekelezwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file does not implement the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation" with a trivial training loop (`score += step`) that has no connection to PPO. The file explicitly lists PPO as a keyword/requirement criterion but does not actually implement it — there are no policy networks, value functions, clipping objectives, advantage estimation, or any other components characteristic of PPO. The `save_expected_artifacts` function merely creates placeholder files with the text "generated by minimal semantic train.py", confirming this is a stub rather than a real implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Maamuzi ya biashara yanarekodiwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/trade_decisions.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/trade_decisions.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual trade decisions. This indicates that real trading decisions were never recorded or saved to the file during simulation execution.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/total_profit.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of an actual computed total profit figure. This indicates the file was not properly populated with real trading simulation results from the PPO reinforcement learning model.

judge_stats.criteria: Mchakato wa faida unaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/profit_curve.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/profit_curve.png` exists in the project structure, but its content cannot be verified because reading the image file resulted in an error (`litellm.BadRequestError` due to an invalid image format issue). Therefore, it cannot be confirmed that a valid profit curve was actually generated and saved correctly. The file may be corrupt or improperly created.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti inayojumuisha mkakati wa biashara, faida, na uchambuzi wa hatari inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/trading_strategy_report.md`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/trading_strategy_report.md` exists but its content is merely `('placeholder', None)`, which is not a valid trading strategy report. It does not contain any trading strategy description, profit analysis, or risk analysis as required. The file is essentially empty/placeholder with no meaningful content.

judge_stats.criteria: Zana ya maingiliano inayoruhusu watumiaji kujaribu vigezo tofauti na kuendesha simulizi kwa kutumia "Streamlit" inatekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/visualize.py` does not implement an interactive Streamlit tool. Instead, it contains only a minimal stub/placeholder that defines some metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `main()` function that simply returns a dictionary with status "ok". There is no actual Streamlit code (e.g., `import streamlit as st`, widgets, sliders, parameter inputs, or simulation execution logic). The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging," confirming it is not a real implementation of the required interactive tool.
